    U

    UnicodeSymbols - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils
    Cross-platform symbols for consistent display on Windows, macOS, and Linux.
    UnicodeSymbols() - Konstruktor für Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.UnicodeSymbols
     
    UNLINK - Statische Variable in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.UnicodeSymbols
     
    UNLOCK - Statische Variable in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.UnicodeSymbols
     
    unregisterWindow(Window) - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.ThemeManager
    Removes a window from theme tracking.
    UPDATE - Statische Variable in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.UnicodeSymbols
     
    updateAllWindows() - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.ThemeManager
    Refreshes all registered windows so the new theme is applied immediately.
    updateArticle(Article) - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.ArticleManager
    Update an existing article in the database
    updateAvailable() - Methode in Datensatzklasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.UpdateManager.VersionComparisonResult
    Gibt den Wert für die Datensatzkomponente updateAvailable zurück.
    updateClient(String, String) - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.ClientManager
    Updates the department of an existing client.
    updateDepartment(String, String) - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.DepartmentManager
    Updates the konto number of a department with the given name.
    UpdateManager - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers
    Manages application updates by checking GitHub releases.
    UpdateManager.ChannelUpdateResult - Datensatzklasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers
    Result of checking all release channels
    UpdateManager.ReleaseChannel - Enum-Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers
    Enum representing different release channels/branches
    UpdateManager.ReleaseInfo - Datensatzklasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers
    Container class for release information.
    UpdateManager.VersionComparisonResult - Datensatzklasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers
    Result of version comparison
    updateNote(String, String) - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.NotesManager
    Updates the content of an existing note identified by its title.
    updateOrder(Order) - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.OrderManager
     
    updateProgress(int, String) - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis.SplashscreenGUI
    Updates the progress bar value and optionally updates the status message.
    updateTheme() - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis.ArticleListGUI
    Called by ThemeManager when the theme changes

    User - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.classes
    Represents a user with a name and a list of order IDs.

    Creates a new user.

    Responsible for determining the directory to write application data, across multiple platforms.
